description_long: This lounge area features a modern, urban design with a combination of seating and workspace elements. The main section includes two large, dark-colored sofas facing each other, separated by a low rectangular coffee table and flanked by two matching ottomans. The seating area is bordered by partial gray walls, creating a semi-enclosed, private atmosphere. Adjacent to the lounge is a workspace with a long wooden desk, an office chair, and shelving units, all arranged against the wall for efficient use of space. The furniture is primarily constructed from wood and upholstered materials, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic. The overall layout is functional and inviting, suitable for socializing, relaxing, or working in an urban environment.
description: A modern lounge setup with two dark sofas, ottomans, a coffee table, and an adjacent workspace featuring a wooden desk and shelving, all within partial gray walls.
description_view_0: This view shows the full lounge layout, highlighting the sofas, ottomans, coffee table, and the adjacent workspace with desk and shelving.
description_view_1: From this angle, the workspace area and the arrangement of the ottomans and sofas are more visible, with the partial walls enclosing the space.
description_view_2: This rear view emphasizes the enclosing gray walls and provides a sense of the overall footprint, with less detail visible of the furniture.
description_view_3: Looking from above and the side, this view reveals the spatial relationship between the lounge and workspace, as well as the placement of the ottomans and tables.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and two back cushions per sofa, all attached and rectangular; two separate ottomans serve as additional seating or footrests.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrests with a flat top and no visible segmentation or tufting, providing a clean, modern look.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sofas, straight and at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, minimalist style.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are short, blocky, and likely made of wood or metal, mostly hidden beneath the sofas and ottomans for a low-profile appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is solid-colored with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
